allow: Bash(ssh -F ~/.ssh/hyperconverged-rxt-sjc-prod.config -i ~/.ssh/hyperconverged-key.pem ubuntu@66.70.103.78 "source /opt/genestack/scripts/genestack.rc && kubectl -n openstack get pods | grep manila")

Bash(ssh -F ~/.ssh/hyperconverged-rxt-sjc-prod.config -i ~/.ssh/hyperconverged-key.pem ubuntu@66.70.103.78 "source /home/ubuntu/.venvs/genestack/bin/activate && set -a && source /opt/genestack/scripts/genestack.rc && set +a && openstack --os-cloud=default role list -f json 2>/dev/null | head -60")

Bash(ssh -F ~/.ssh/hyperconverged-rxt-sjc-prod.config -i ~/.ssh/hyperconverged-key.pem ubuntu@66.70.103.78 'source /home/ubuntu/.venvs/genestack/bin/activate && set -a && source /opt/genestack/scripts/genestack.rc && set +a && echo ""=== Neutron: all networks with manila in name ==="" && openstack --os-cloud=default network list --long -f value 2>&1 | grep -i manila && echo && echo ""=== Check if 10bb667f exists ==="" && openstack --os-cloud=default network show 10bb667f-d910-476a-bfbb-eb93ce863110 2>&1 && echo && echo ""=== Manila DB: check network_allocations ==="" && MARIADB_POD=$\(kubectl -n openstack get pods -l application=mariadb --field-selector=status.phase=Running -o jsonpath=""{.items[0].metadata.name}""\) && ROOT_PASS=$\(kubectl -n openstack get secret mariadb -o jsonpath=""{.data.root-password}"" | base64 -d\) && kubectl -n openstack exec ""$MARIADB_POD"" -- mariadb -u root -p""$ROOT_PASS"" -e ""SELECT id, neutron_net_id, neutron_subnet_id, network_type FROM manila.network_allocations LIMIT 20;"" 2>&1')

Bash(ssh -F ~/.ssh/hyperconverged-rxt-sjc-prod.config -i ~/.ssh/hyperconverged-key.pem ubuntu@66.70.103.78 'source /home/ubuntu/.venvs/genestack/bin/activate && set -a && source /opt/genestack/scripts/genestack.rc && set +a && echo ""=== flat network ==="" && openstack --os-cloud=default network show flat -f value -c id && echo ""=== flat subnets ==="" && openstack --os-cloud=default subnet list --network flat -f value -c ID -c Name -c Subnet')

Bash(ssh -F ~/.ssh/hyperconverged-rxt-sjc-prod.config -i ~/.ssh/hyperconverged-key.pem ubuntu@66.70.103.78 "sed -i ''s|admin_network_id: b4d72188-25bc-4559-a68d-9fbf773425a9|admin_network_id: 20bb4a4a-9ec8-4a7e-8f13-187db0df0aef|'' /etc/genestack/helm-configs/manila/manila-helm-overrides.yaml && sed -i ''s|admin_subnet_id: c38a1f3e-1500-401d-a659-c697889ebc7c|admin_subnet_id: df0a0bc8-b264-4c17-8e94-da26892c3c02|'' /etc/genestack/helm-configs/manila/manila-helm-overrides.yaml && echo ''Updated.'' && grep -A3 generic_admin_network /etc/genestack/helm-configs/manila/manila-helm-overrides.yaml")

Bash(ssh -F ~/.ssh/hyperconverged-rxt-sjc-prod.config -i ~/.ssh/hyperconverged-key.pem ubuntu@66.70.103.78 'source /home/ubuntu/.venvs/genestack/bin/activate && set -a && source /opt/genestack/scripts/genestack.rc && set +a && echo ""=== Current helm status ==="" && helm -n openstack status manila 2>&1 | head -10')

Bash(ssh -F ~/.ssh/hyperconverged-rxt-sjc-prod.config -i ~/.ssh/hyperconverged-key.pem ubuntu@66.70.103.78 'source /home/ubuntu/.venvs/genestack/bin/activate && set -a && source /opt/genestack/scripts/genestack.rc && set +a && helm -n openstack rollback manila 5 2>&1')

Bash(ssh -F ~/.ssh/hyperconverged-rxt-sjc-prod.config -i ~/.ssh/hyperconverged-key.pem ubuntu@66.70.103.78 'source /home/ubuntu/.venvs/genestack/bin/activate && set -a && source /opt/genestack/scripts/genestack.rc && set +a && sleep 5 && kubectl -n openstack delete pods -l application=manila,component=share --force 2>&1 && sleep 10 && kubectl -n openstack get pods -l application=manila -o wide 2>&1 | grep -v Completed')

Bash(ssh -F ~/.ssh/hyperconverged-rxt-sjc-prod.config -i ~/.ssh/hyperconverged-key.pem ubuntu@66.70.103.78 'source /home/ubuntu/.venvs/genestack/bin/activate && set -a && source /opt/genestack/scripts/genestack.rc && set +a && kubectl -n openstack delete pod manila-db-init-rnbqc --force 2>&1 && kubectl -n openstack delete pod manila-share-569cbd6955-jc7qj --force 2>&1; sleep 15 && kubectl -n openstack get pods -l application=manila 2>&1 | grep -v Completed | grep -v Terminating')

Bash(ssh -F ~/.ssh/hyperconverged-rxt-sjc-prod.config -i ~/.ssh/hyperconverged-key.pem ubuntu@66.70.103.78 'source /home/ubuntu/.venvs/genestack/bin/activate && set -a && source /opt/genestack/scripts/genestack.rc && set +a && helm upgrade --install manila openstack-helm/manila --namespace=openstack --values /etc/genestack/helm-configs/manila/manila-helm-overrides.yaml --post-renderer /etc/genestack/kustomize/kustomize.sh --post-renderer-args manila/overlay --timeout 120m 2>&1')
